common.metaDescription: Expert evaluation platform for the MEED+ model (CORFO)
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.title: MEED+ — Expert Validation
landing.intro1: The Open Earth Foundation (OEF) and SSG, under the CORFO contract, are validating the MEED+ model for prioritizing climate actions in Chilean municipalities.
landing.intro2: As part of a panel of 13 Chilean climate-planning experts, your evaluation will let us measure the model's performance against expert judgment.
landing.intro3: Enter your registered email to receive an access link. No password required.
landing.intro4: The full process takes about 40 minutes; you can pause and resume any time.
landing.checkInboxBody: If your email is registered, you'll receive an access link within a few minutes. The link is valid for 7 days.
landing.checkInboxNote: If you don't receive it, contact the SSG team.
landing.unrecognized: This email isn't registered. Contact the SSG team.

onboarding.title: Before you begin
onboarding.consentBody: Your evaluation will be used anonymously and in aggregate to validate the MEED+ model for CORFO. Individual data is accessible only to the OEF and SSG technical teams, exclusively for model analysis. No individual data will be shared with third parties or publicly linked to your name.
onboarding.consentCheckbox: I agree to participate in this evaluation.
onboarding.preferenceIntro: Are there cities where you have particular expertise? (Optional, up to 2)
onboarding.preferenceHelp: If you select any, we'll try to assign you at least one. Otherwise, cities are assigned automatically.
onboarding.errorMustConsent: You must accept the consent statement to continue.
onboarding.errorMaxTwoCities: You can choose at most 2 cities.

pillars.fullIntro: The MEED+ model combines three pillars with the weights below to prioritize mitigation actions. For this validation the weights are fixed; in production they will be tunable per city.
pillars.fullNote: When evaluating actions, treat these pillars as the criteria the model applied to the ranking.

alignment.label: Alignment
alignment.description: Political support, alignment with stated sector priorities, and co-benefits.

feasibility.label: Feasibility
feasibility.description: Legal environment, governance capacity, and socioeconomic fit for the city.

dashboard.subtitle: These are the cities assigned for your evaluation.
dashboard.noAssignments: You don't have any city assignments yet. Check back later or contact the SSG team.

evaluate.sectionAsubtitle: Read a brief overview of the city before evaluating the recommended actions.
evaluate.emissionsSubtitle: Share of the GHG inventory by sector ({{units}})
evaluate.emissionsNullSector: Data not available for this sector
evaluate.statedPriorityCallout: Stated sector priority for this city: {{sector}}
evaluate.noStatedPriority: The city did not declare a sector priority.
evaluate.stage1Title: Stage 1 — Which are the 3 priority actions?
evaluate.stage1Intro: The model identified 3 priority actions for this city. They are shown to you in random order, with no indication of the rank the model assigned. For each one, indicate whether you agree it belongs among the 3 priority actions.
evaluate.stage2Title: Stage 2 — Which are the 10 recommended actions?
evaluate.stage2Intro: Now you'll see the 10 actions recommended by the model, including the 3 from Stage 1, in a fresh random order. Rate each one again — this time, indicate whether it belongs among the 10 recommended actions. Your answers here are independent of Stage 1.
evaluate.stage3Title: Stage 3 — Reorder the top 5 priority actions
evaluate.stage3Intro: Now you can see the positions the model assigned. If you would reorder these 5 actions, drag them. This stage is about order, not value — these are all actions the model considers priority.
evaluate.likertPromptTop3: Do you agree this action belongs among the 3 priority actions for this city?
evaluate.likertPromptTop10: Do you agree this action belongs among the 10 recommended actions for this city?
evaluate.notSureLabel: I'm not sure about this action
evaluate.sectionCsubtitle: Are there actions you expected to see among the 10 recommended ones that aren't shown? (Optional, up to 3)
evaluate.sectionEsubtitle: Any comments on the recommendations for this city? (Optional, up to 1000 characters)
evaluate.commentPlaceholder: Share any observations that help interpret your ratings.
evaluate.validationMissingStage1: Rate all 3 actions in Stage 1 before continuing.
evaluate.validationMissingStage2: Rate all 10 actions in Stage 2 before continuing.
evaluate.validationMissingRatings: {{count}} answers still missing. Complete all questions to submit.
evaluate.resumeNotice: You picked up where you left off. Your previous answers were restored.

complete.title: Thanks for completing the evaluation!
complete.body1: Your responses were recorded successfully and will be used, alongside those of the other experts, to validate the MEED+ model for CORFO.
complete.body2: Results will be shared in aggregate with SSG and CORFO. If you have any questions, contact the SSG team.

auth.linkInvalid: This link is invalid or has already been used.
auth.linkExpired: This link has expired. Request a new one from the SSG team.
